acceptanceCriteria: Given no cart exists, When the caller creates a cart with currency code EUR, Then a cart is returned with an assigned id and currency code EUR
Given no cart exists, When the caller creates a cart without a currency code, Then the command is rejected with a required-field error on currency code
Given no cart exists, When the caller creates a cart with an inline billing address and shipping address, Then the cart is returned with both addresses attached

Given an address already exists, When the caller creates a cart referencing that address id as both billing and shipping, Then the cart is returned with both addresses pointing to the referenced address
Given no cart exists, When the caller creates a cart with an inline line item including title, quantity, and unit price, Then the cart is returned with that line item in its items collection
Given no carts exist, When the caller creates two carts in one call, Then both carts are created with their respective items
Given a cart exists, When the caller updates the cart's email, Then the cart is returned with the new email
Given a cart exists, When the caller updates the cart via a selector that matches it, Then the cart is updated
Given no cart with a given id exists, When the caller updates that id, Then the command is rejected with a not-found error
Given a cart exists, When the caller adds a line item with title, quantity 1 and unit price 100, Then the cart contains exactly one line item with those values
Given a cart exists, When the caller adds several line items in one call, Then all items are present on the cart
Given two carts exist, When the caller adds line items for both carts in one call, Then each cart receives its respective items
Given a cart id that does not exist, When the caller adds a line item, Then the command is rejected with a not-found error
Given a cart exists, When the caller adds a line item missing quantity, Then the command is rejected with a required-field error on quantity
Given a line item exists, When the caller updates its title via id, Then the new title is returned
Given a line item exists, When the caller updates its title via a cart id selector, Then the matching line item's title is updated
Given several line items exist across carts, When the caller updates via multiple selectors in one call, Then every matching line item is updated
Given a cart exists and an address is created, When the caller attaches the address id as the cart's billing address, Then the cart reflects that billing address
Given an address is attached to a cart as billing address, When the caller updates first name on that address, Then the cart's billing address reflects the new first name
Given a cart exists and an address is created, When the caller attaches the address id as the cart's shipping address, Then the cart reflects that shipping address
Given an address is attached to a cart as shipping address, When the caller updates first name on that address, Then the cart's shipping address reflects the new first name
Given a cart exists, When the caller adds a shipping method with name and amount 100, Then the method appears on the cart
Given a cart exists, When the caller adds a shipping method with a negative amount, Then the command is rejected for check-constraint violation
Given two carts exist, When the caller adds a shipping method to each in one call, Then each cart receives its method
Given a cart has line items, When the caller sets adjustments for each line item, Then those adjustments are present
Given a cart already has a line-item adjustment, When the caller sets a different adjustment for the same line item, Then only the new adjustment remains
Given a cart has line-item adjustments, When the caller sets the adjustments to an empty list, Then all adjustments on all line items are removed
Given a cart has a line-item adjustment with id A, When the caller sets adjustments containing id A with changed fields, Then the adjustment with id A is updated in place
Given a cart has shipping methods, When the caller sets adjustments for each shipping method, Then those adjustments are present
Given a cart has a shipping-method adjustment, When the caller sets a different adjustment for the same shipping method, Then only the new one remains
Given a cart has shipping-method adjustments, When the caller sets them to empty, Then all are removed

Given a shipping method belongs to cart A, When the caller tries to add an adjustment for that method against cart B, Then the command is rejected because the shipping method does not belong to cart B
Given a cart has line items, When the caller sets tax lines per item with code and rate, Then those tax lines are present
Given a cart has a line-item tax line, When the caller sets a different tax line for the same item, Then only the new one remains
Given a cart has line-item tax lines, When the caller sets them to empty, Then all are removed

Given a cart has two tax lines on one item, When the caller sets a list containing one updated existing id and one brand-new tax line, Then the updated line is updated, the new line is created, and the omitted line is removed
Given a cart has shipping methods, When the caller sets tax lines per method, Then those tax lines are present
Given a cart has a shipping tax line, When the caller sets a different tax line for the same method, Then only the new one remains
Given a cart has shipping tax lines, When the caller sets them to empty, Then all are removed

Given a cart has two shipping tax lines on one method, When the caller sets a list with one updated existing id and one new line, Then the updated line is updated, the new line is created, and the omitted line is removed
Given a cart exists, When the caller adds a credit line with an amount and reference, Then the credit line appears on the cart
Given a cart exists, When the caller adds a credit line missing an amount, Then the command is rejected with a required-field error
Given a cart has a credit line, When the caller removes it, Then the cart has no credit lines
Given a cart has a shipping method, When the caller removes it, Then the cart has no shipping methods
Given a line item exists on a cart, When the caller removes it, Then the cart's items collection is empty
Given multiple line items exist on a cart, When the caller removes them all, Then the cart's items collection is empty
Given a cart exists, When the caller deletes it, Then it is no longer listed for that id
Given a cart has been soft-deleted, When the caller restores it via id, Then the cart and its relations are available again

Cart.description: Aggregate root representing a shopping cart holding purchasable items and selected shipping methods prior to checkout.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the cart, generated by the system.

fields.name: currencyCode
fields.description: Fixed currency code for the cart at creation.

fields.name: regionId
fields.description: External reference to the region defining pricing and availability.

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: External reference to the customer owning the cart.

fields.name: salesChannelId
fields.description: External reference to the sales channel context for the cart.

fields.name: email
fields.description: Contact email address of the buyer.

fields.name: locale
fields.description: Language and formatting locale of the customer session.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration and extension data for the cart.

fields.name: lineItems
fields.description: Collection of purchasable products added to the cart.

fields.name: billingAddress
fields.description: The postal location used for billing and invoicing.

fields.name: shippingAddress
fields.description: The physical destination selected for delivering the order.

fields.name: shippingMethods
fields.description: Collection of chosen delivery options for the cart.

fields.name: creditLines
fields.description: Monetary credits like refunds or store credit applied against the cart total.

LineItem.description: Entity representing a purchasable item added to the cart, holding an independent snapshot of product details.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the line item.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Display title of the item as snapshotted when added to the cart.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Number of units being purchased.

fields.name: unitPrice
fields.description: Price per individual unit at the moment the item was added or updated.

fields.name: subtitle
fields.description: Secondary display title or short description of the item.

fields.name: thumbnail
fields.description: URL to the image representing the product.

fields.name: variantId
fields.description: External reference to the specific product variant in the catalog.

fields.name: productId
fields.description: External reference to the parent product in the catalog.

fields.name: productTitle
fields.description: Snapshotted title of the parent product.

fields.name: productDescription
fields.description: Snapshotted full description of the product.

fields.name: productSubtitle
fields.description: Snapshotted subtitle of the parent product.

fields.name: productType
fields.description: Category or type of the product.

fields.name: productTypeId
fields.description: External reference to the product type configuration.

fields.name: productCollection
fields.description: Identifier or name of the collection the product belongs to.

fields.name: productHandle
fields.description: URL-friendly identifier for the product.

fields.name: variantSku
fields.description: Stock Keeping Unit identifier for the variant.

fields.name: variantBarcode
fields.description: Barcode or UPC associated with the variant.

fields.name: variantTitle
fields.description: Title distinguishing this variant from others.

fields.name: variantOptionValues
fields.description: Detailed snapshotted mapping of variant option selections like color or size.

fields.name: requiresShipping
fields.description: Flag indicating if this physical item needs delivery.

fields.name: isDiscountable
fields.description: Flag indicating if the item is eligible for promotional discounts.

fields.name: isGiftcard
fields.description: Flag indicating if the line item is a gift card purchase.

fields.name: isTaxInclusive
fields.description: Flag indicating whether the unit price already includes tax.

fields.name: isCustomPrice
fields.description: Flag marking if the price was overridden manually rather than fetched from the catalog.

fields.name: compareAtUnitPrice
fields.description: Original list price of the variant, typically used for strike-through visuals.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the line item.

fields.name: lineItemAdjustments
fields.description: Collection of promotional discounts applied exclusively to this line item.

fields.name: lineItemTaxLines
fields.description: Collection of computed tax charges applied to this line item.

ShippingMethod.description: Entity representing a chosen delivery option for the cart, carrying its own cost and configuration.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the shipping method selection.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the selected shipping option.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Base cost of the shipping service.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Additional descriptive details about the shipping method.

fields.name: shippingOptionId
fields.description: External reference to the underlying fulfillment shipping option.

fields.name: data
fields.description: Carrier-specific configuration payload or constraints.

fields.name: isTaxInclusive
fields.description: Flag indicating whether the shipping amount already includes tax.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Integration metadata attached to the shipping method.

fields.name: shippingMethodAdjustments
fields.description: Collection of promotional discounts applied against this shipping cost.

fields.name: shippingMethodTaxLines
fields.description: Collection of computed tax charges applied to this shipping cost.

CreditLine.description: Entity representing a monetary credit applied to the cart, typically from refunds or store credit.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the credit line.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Monetary value to apply; positive values indicate credit toward the cart total.

fields.name: reference
fields.description: Name or classification of the external system providing the credit.

fields.name: referenceId
fields.description: External identifier locating the specific source document in the external system.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Additional integration data detailing the credit conditions.

BillingAddress.description: Value object representing the postal location used for billing purposes; immutable and replaced as a whole.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: First name of the billing contact.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: Last name of the billing contact.

fields.name: company
fields.description: Company name associated with the billing address.

fields.name: address1
fields.description: Primary street address line.

fields.name: address2
fields.description: Secondary address line for apartment, suite, or building details.

fields.name: city
fields.description: City or locality of the billing address.

fields.name: province
fields.description: State, province, or region.

fields.name: postalCode
fields.description: Postal or ZIP code.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: ISO-3166 alpha-2 country code.

fields.name: phone
fields.description: Contact phone number for billing inquiries.

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: External reference to a saved customer profile for this address.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the billing address.

ShippingAddress.description: Value object representing the physical destination for delivering the order; immutable and replaced as a whole.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: First name of the recipient.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: Last name of the recipient.

fields.name: company
fields.description: Company name if delivery is to a business.

fields.name: address1
fields.description: Primary street address for delivery.

fields.name: address2
fields.description: Secondary address line like unit or apartment number.

fields.name: city
fields.description: City or locality for the delivery destination.

fields.name: province
fields.description: State, province, or region for the delivery destination.

fields.name: postalCode
fields.description: Postal or ZIP code of the delivery destination.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: ISO-3166 alpha-2 country code.

fields.name: phone
fields.description: Contact phone number for the courier.

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: External reference to a saved customer profile for this address.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form data attached to the shipping address.

LineItemAdjustment.description: Value object representing a promotional discount applied to a specific line item; replaced as a whole.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: The monetary value of the discount to deduct.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Promotion or coupon code that triggered this adjustment.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable explanation of the adjustment.

fields.name: promotionId
fields.description: External reference to the promotion aggregate defining the rule.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the system or external provider that computed this adjustment.

fields.name: isTaxInclusive
fields.description: Flag indicating if the discount amount is treated as tax-inclusive.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Integration metadata attached to the adjustment.

LineItemTaxLine.description: Value object representing a tax charge applied to a line item; replaced as a whole.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Tax code defining the tax type applied.

fields.name: rate
fields.description: Percentage rate of the tax.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable label for the tax line.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the tax provider engine that calculated the rate.

fields.name: taxRateId
fields.description: External reference to the Tax aggregate's defined rate.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Extra integration data describing the tax calculation.

ShippingMethodAdjustment.description: Value object representing a discount applied to a shipping method; replaced as a whole.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: The monetary value deducted from the shipping method amount.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Promotion code or logic label that triggered this adjustment.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable explanation of the shipping discount.

fields.name: promotionId
fields.description: External reference to the promotion aggregate supplying the rule.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the discount provider engine.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Extra integration metadata describing the shipping adjustment.

ShippingMethodTaxLine.description: Value object representing a tax charge applied to a shipping method; replaced as a whole.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Tax code distinguishing the type of shipping tax.

fields.name: rate
fields.description: Percentage rate levied against the shipping amount.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Label providing context for the shipping tax line.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the tax calculator engine handling shipping.

fields.name: taxRateId
fields.description: External reference pointing to the defined tax rate aggregate.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration details regarding the shipping tax.
